_meta.note: LOCAL DC Council/Mayor batch 2 — bowser + mendelson + robert-white-dc + trayon-white + wendell-felder. Continues prior DC batch (Allen+Henderson+Crawford+LewisGeorge+Frumin). Headline catches: TRAYON WHITE lone-NO on RCCA override + lone-NO on noncitizen-voting (Law 24-242) — TWO HARD-TRUE cross-party deviations; BOWSER hardest pro-MPD DC Dem + FY26 Grow-DC business-friendly + 2025 attempted Sanctuary Values repeal (3 deviation TRUEs); MENDELSON FY22 millionaire-tax lone-5 NO + 2015 DC Opportunity Scholarship voucher reauth endorsement + Secure DC pro-MPD-budget posture (2 deviation TRUEs); FELDER Ward-7 pro-MPD/Secure-DC endorsement cluster aligned with Henderson/Pinto; ROBERT WHITE clean DC At-Large progressive (5th archetype-5 FALSE-cluster signature-bill catch — Allen+Crawford+LewisGeorge+Frumin+R.White). DC consistency rule: refuse_state_overreach cells all NULL (DC is not a state, same handling as prior batch).

set.office: Mayor of the District of Columbia

profile.background: Mayor of DC since Jan 2 2015 (3rd term, re-elected Nov 2022, term ends Jan 2027). Prior: Ward 4 DC Councilmember 2007-2015. ANC commissioner 2004-2007. AU + Chatham U. Hardest pro-MPD DC Democrat: opposed 2020 Council MPD cuts, set 4000-officer pathway, signed Secure DC 2024. FY26 Grow-DC budget repeals Initiative 82 + avoids tax hikes. May 2025 proposed REPEAL of Sanctuary Values Act provisions barring MPD-ICE cooperation (Council blocked). Counter: signed Human Rights Sanctuary Act + Pride flag-raisings + Reign curriculum + 2020 BLM Plaza (removed March 2025 under federal pressure) + COVID worship-cap + Sister Byrne religious-exemption suit + DC vaccine mandate ruled unlawful by DC Superior Court.

muriel-bowser.notes_set: DC archetype-5 MIXED-RECORD MAYOR — THREE significant rightward deviations on policing (TRUE q0/q1/q2/q4), economic stewardship (TRUE q2 — FY26 Grow-DC repeals Initiative 82 tipped-wage + no tax hikes + business-friendly), and border (TRUE q2 — May 2025 FY26 budget proposed REPEAL of Sanctuary Values Act MPD-ICE-cooperation bar, Council removed provision) layered over conventional progressive base on life/marriage/family/election/2A/christian-liberty. Pro-MPD posture is the strongest deviation: 2020 American Prospect headline 'For the Mayor of Washington, Black Lives Matter; Defunding the Police Does Not.' Counter-evidence honestly cited: 2020 BLM Plaza painting (16th St NW June 5 2020, REMOVED March 10 2025 under congressional Clyde-bill pressure); COVID worship-cap (50-person, loosened to 250 only after DC Catholic Archdiocese sued); Sister Dede Byrne forced to litigate for religious vax exemption; DC Act 24-280 student vax mandate ruled unlawful by DC Superior Court. Net /100 estimate: low-to-mid teens (~13-17) — three real TRUE deviations cluster in econ + public_justice + border but life/marriage/family/election/self-defense all FALSE. DC consistency rule: refuse_state_overreach all NULL (DC is not a state).

set.office: DC Council Chairman (At-Large since 1999; Chairman since 2012)

profile.background: DC Council Chairman since 2012, At-Large since 1999. Running for re-election in June 16 2026 D primary (vs Jack Evans, Calvin Gurley). Institutional spine of DC progressive program: RCCA introducer/chair, Sanctuary Values co-sponsor, Marriage Equality Act 2009 shepherd, Human Rights Sanctuary Act 2022 co-sponsor, ghost-gun champion. Moderate relative to Allen/Lewis-George/Parker on FISCAL only (FY22 millionaire-tax lone-5 NO with Cheh/Pinto/McDuffie/Bonds) and pragmatic on MPD funding (April 2024 sparing MPD/education from cuts; defended officer vehicle-pursuit authority). 2015 jointly with Bowser urged 5-yr DC Opportunity Scholarship voucher reauth — rare DC D openly defending federal voucher.

phil-mendelson.notes_set: DC archetype-5 SIGNATURE-BILL FALSE catch cluster — RCCA introducer/chair (Oct 2021) + Sanctuary Values Act 2020 co-introducer + Marriage Equality 2009 shepherd + Human Rights Sanctuary 2022 co-sponsor + Minor Consent Vaccinations 2020 co-sponsor + ghost-gun Jan 2019 introducer + red-flag Dec 2018 votes-in-place. TWO HARD-TRUE DEVIATIONS: (1) family q0 — 2015 DC Opportunity Scholarship voucher reauth endorsement WITH Bowser (rare DC D pro-voucher position, WaPo op-ed); (2) public_justice q0 — Secure DC + April 2024 sparing MPD/Education from 'substantial cuts' + defended officer vehicle-pursuit authority ('current law too restrictive'). FY22 millionaire-tax lone-5 NO is a fiscal-deviation flag but doesn't clear econ q2 TRUE alone since he chaired through FY25/FY26 sales+property tax hikes. DC consistency: refuse_state_overreach all NULL. Net /100 estimate: ~7-10 (2 TRUEs / ~26 scoreable). Christian-liberty all NULL — no direct pronoun/displays/Sabbath record.

0.note: As Judiciary chair, shepherded Religious Freedom and Civil Marriage Equality Act 2009; voted YES on 11-2 final passage Dec 15 2009: 'Marriage is one of the basic civil rights of man.'

2.note: Co-sponsored Human Rights Sanctuary Act 2022 explicitly protecting gender-affirming care for minors as legal sanctuary.

set.office: DC Council, At-Large (sitting · 2026 D nominee for DC Congressional Delegate)

profile.background: DC Council At-Large since Sept 16 2016. Re-elected 2020 and 2024 (defeated Rodney Grant in D primary). Lost 2022 D mayoral primary to Bowser (carried only Ward 1). Announced Sept 2025 run for DC Congressional Delegate seat (replacing retiring Eleanor Holmes Norton) — NOT 2026 mayoral. Committee Chair: Housing (2023-present); previously Government Operations & Facilities (2021-22, where he chaired abortion-shield-law hearings). Lead introducer of THREE abortion-expansion bills 2022 (Reproductive shield package). Co-introducer Sanctuary Values Act 2019. Co-sponsor Local Resident Voting Rights Act 2022 (noncitizen voting). Voted YES on RCCA override Jan 2023. Voted YES on Secure DC final passage Mar 2024 BUT filed PEACE DC amendment to STRIP permanent-pretrial-detention provisions (net decarceration posture).

robert-white-dc.notes_set: DC ARCHETYPE-5 SIGNATURE-BILL FALSE-CLUSTER 5TH CATCH (after Allen + Crawford + Lewis-George + Frumin in prior batch). Clean DC At-Large progressive Democrat — no genuine cross-party TRUE deviations across life/marriage/family/economic/election/border/self-defense/justice. 2022 mayoral platform OPPOSED hiring more police: 'audit to determine how many officers are necessary,' wanted to strip MPD of mental-health/noise/traffic calls (HARD-FALSE public_justice q0). Three abortion-expansion bills 2022 + Pride Plates Amendment Act 2023 + Sanctuary Values 2019 co-introducer + noncitizen-voting 2022 co-sponsor + FY22 millionaire-tax YES + Secure DC YES but PEACE DC amendment to strip pretrial-detention (net decarceration). Christian-liberty all NULL — no direct evidence. 'Federal occupation' Aug 2025 statement opposing Trump's MPD federalization is anti-federal posture but motive is sanctuary-protection / anti-Trump; rubric application: NULL on refuse_state_overreach (DC not state + motive doesn't align with rubric). 2026 race: running for DC Congressional Delegate against Norton-retirement field, not mayor. Net /100 estimate: ~0-3 (essentially zero TRUE across all 30 cells).

set.office: DC Council, Ward 8 (returned via special election July 2025; under federal indictment)

profile.background: DC Council Ward 8 since Jan 2017. STATUS-CRITICAL ARC: arrested by FBI Aug 18 2024 on federal bribery (18 U.S.C. § 666) — alleged $156K cash bribes from city violence-intervention contractor. DC Council EXPELLED 12-0 Feb 4 2025 (first expulsion in 50-year home-rule history). WON Ward 8 special election July 15 2025 (~30% in 7-way race) to fill his own vacated seat. Federal trial scheduled Sept 2026. Pentecostal/Baptist Ward 8 church ties (HuffPost 'The Rev. Trayon White' 2018). 2018 antisemitic 'Rothschilds controlling the climate' weather-control remarks (WaPo). Lewis-George 'mentor' public-affiliation May 2026.

trayon-white.notes_set: TWO HARD-TRUE CROSS-PARTY DEVIATIONS (the headline catches of this batch): (1) election_integrity q1 — LONE NO vote 12-1 on Local Resident Voting Rights Amendment Act 2022 (D.C. Law 24-242, noncitizen voting). THE ONLY DC Councilmember to oppose; verified 3x against Allen/Henderson/Lewis-George batch entries. (2) public_justice q1 — LONE NO vote 12-1 on RCCA veto override Jan 17 2023. THE ONLY DC Councilmember to refuse the override; verified against WJLA URL slug 'trayon-white-no-override.' Both lone-dissents reflect Ward 8 lived gun-violence reality (RCCA) + sovereignty/citizenship intuition (noncitizen-voting). Secure DC Mar 2024 vote: LONE PRESENT (12 YES, Trayon Present alone) — declined rather than opposed, so public_justice q4 NULL not TRUE. Federal bribery indictment Aug 2024 + 12-0 Council expulsion Feb 4 2025 + special-election win July 15 2025 cabined to notes_set per rubric methodology (POLICY-only scoring; presumption of innocence applies). 2018 Rothschild weather-control antisemitic remarks (WaPo March 18 2018 + tour-walkout of US Holocaust Memorial Museum) factual-record entry; does not score marriage cell. Christian-liberty q0 NULL not TRUE per honest-confidence rule — uses 'Rev.' honorific but no clean profession-of-Christ statement. Net /100 estimate: ~25-30 — TWO HARD-TRUE deviations partially offset by 5 progressive-bloc FALSEs (marriage q2 sanctuary, family q1 vax consent, econ q2 millionaire tax, border q2 sanctuary). DC consistency: refuse_state_overreach all NULL. Lewis-George 'mentor' affiliation May 2026 cross-verified against Lewis-George refinement entry.

profile.background: DC Council Ward 7 since Jan 2 2025. Won June 2024 D primary by ~400 votes / 3.5% over more-progressive Ebony Payne; succeeded retiring Vincent Gray. WaPo + Gray + Pinto + Parker + Trayon White endorsements. Mayfair NE resident, 4th-gen Washingtonian, ANC 7D chair (4 terms), Ward 7 Dems org chair, DC WASA Board. Committee on Judiciary & Public Safety member; Chair Subcommittee on Local Business Development; also Health, Human Services, Public Works. Pro-MPD/Secure-DC accountability posture cluster with Henderson/Pinto. Pro-business platform (Ward 7 Business Incubator Fund, prevent business displacement). Twice introduced emergency legislation to delay RCV implementation (citizen-approved Initiative 83) — minority position within D caucus.

wendell-felder.notes_set: WARD 7 D MODERATE — public-safety-forward, pro-business, anti-RCV-implementation, no culture-war footprint. TWO deviation TRUEs: public_justice q0 (platform 'supporting law enforcement' + Police Safety Council + Ward 7 Public Safety Walk with Pinto/Allen) + public_justice q1 ('Secure DC Act shines a necessary light on the urgent need to address accountability'). Weak DEVIATION on family q0 (platform 'alternative educational options regardless of neighborhood and school type' + Ward 7 heavy charter base). FALSE on marriage q0 (accepted Capital Stonewall Democrats endorsement Oct 2024 without distancing). RCV-delay attempts (twice; budget version rejected 7-5, Dec 2025 measure withdrawn) don't fit any of the 3 LOCAL election cells (q0 paper ballots / q1 voter ID / q4 Zuckerbucks) — noted as procedural-deviation. 21 of 30 cells honestly NULL — newcomer ~17-month record, Ward-7-economic-development-and-public-safety platform, deliberately quiet on life/marriage/border/2A culture-war cells. DC consistency: refuse_state_overreach all NULL. Closer to Henderson/Pinto cluster than Allen/Lewis-George defund-MPD lineage. Net /100 estimate: low-teens.
